moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale concluded yesterday, July 19th, with New Zealander Ryan Fox lifting the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Winner Shoutout
angles.copy: What a weekend of golf! Huge congrats to Ryan Fox on winning The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale yesterday. The Claret Jug is heading to New Zealand!

angles.name: Post-event chat
angles.copy: The dust is settling on a thrilling Open Championship. Who was your standout player from Royal Birkdale this year?

moments.title: Commonwealth Games Start in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games kick off on Thursday, July 23rd, bringing over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations to Scotland for 11 days of competition.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Ready for some world-class sport? The Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow this Thursday! Who are you cheering on?

angles.name: Local Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow is about to host the Commonwealth Games! Get ready for 11 days of incredible athletic feats, starting July 23rd.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23rd-26th, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Henham Park, Suffolk is about to come alive with David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more from Thursday.

angles.name: Who's Going?
angles.copy: Who's heading to Latitude this weekend? Get ready for four days of music, comedy, and arts in the Suffolk sunshine!

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final Week
moments.blurb: The Love Island 2026 final is set to air on Monday, July 27th, bringing another season of villa drama to a close.

angles.name: Final Prediction
angles.copy: It's the final week of Love Island! Who do you think will be crowned the winners on Monday 27th July?

angles.name: Wrap-up Excitement
angles.copy: The Love Island final is just days away! Get your popcorn ready for Monday 27th as we find out who wins the £50k.

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are officially underway across much of the UK, with many families now enjoying their break.

angles.name: Happy Holidays
angles.copy: Happy Summer Holidays! Schools are out across the UK. What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Local Plans
angles.copy: The school summer holidays have begun in Wales! Whether you're staying local or heading off, enjoy the break!

moments.title: UK Weather: Warm Spells & Drought Concerns
moments.blurb: Parts of the UK are experiencing warmer than average temperatures and ongoing dry conditions, with drought measures in place in some areas of England.

angles.name: Weather Update
angles.copy: It's a mixed bag of summer weather across the UK this week – warm in the south, but with a chance of showers. Don't forget to stay hydrated!

angles.name: Water Conservation
angles.copy: Drought conditions continue in parts of England. Remember to use water wisely and look out for local updates.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 today.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track to get lost in?

angles.name: Musical Icon
angles.copy: Turning 79 today, the iconic Carlos Santana! Still making magic on the guitar. Celebrate with a classic from the legend.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: Singer Kim Carnes, known for her hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', celebrates her 81st birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to Kim Carnes! Still got 'Bette Davis Eyes' stuck in your head?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Kim Carnes is 81 today! The voice behind one of the biggest 80s hits. What a legend!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Sex Pistols drummer Paul Cook celebrates his 70th birthday today.

angles.name: Punk Legend
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to punk icon Paul Cook of the Sex Pistols! Still sounds as fresh as ever.

angles.name: 70s Rock
angles.copy: Raise a glass to Paul Cook from the Sex Pistols, turning 70 today! What's your favourite punk anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stone Gossard
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist Stone Gossard turns 60 today.

angles.name: Grunge Icon
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Pearl Jam's amazing guitarist, Stone Gossard! What's your go-to Pearl Jam track?

angles.name: 90s Rock
angles.copy: Celebrating Stone Gossard of Pearl Jam, who is 60 today! Still rocking out after all these years.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Damian Marley
moments.blurb: Reggae artist Damian Marley, son of Bob Marley, celebrates his 48th birthday tomorrow, July 21st.

angles.name: Reggae Star
angles.copy: Tomorrow is Damian Marley's 48th birthday! What's your favourite track from 'Jr. Gong'?

angles.name: Birthday Countdown
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Damian Marley's birthday tomorrow! The reggae star turns 48.

moments.title: Happy Birthday George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk legend George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, will be 85 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Godfather
angles.copy: Get on the good foot! George Clinton turns 85 on Wednesday! What's your favourite Parliament-Funkadelic jam?

angles.name: P-Funk Power
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton, on July 22nd! Still tearing up the stage.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and singer Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley of The Eagles on Wednesday! What's your favourite track from the legend?

angles.name: Classic Rock Voice
angles.copy: It's Don Henley's 79th birthday on July 22nd! The voice behind so many classic rock anthems.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Keith Sweat
moments.blurb: R&B singer Keith Sweat, known for hits like 'Twisted' and 'Nobody', turns 65 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: R&B Icon
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to R&B icon Keith Sweat on Wednesday! What's your favourite slow jam from him?

angles.name: 90s R&B
angles.copy: Keith Sweat is 65 on July 22nd! Get ready to get 'Twisted' with some classic R&B.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Verdine White
moments.blurb: Earth, Wind & Fire bassist Verdine White celebrates his 75th birthday on Friday, July 25th.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Boogie Wonderland! Verdine White from Earth, Wind & Fire turns 75 on Friday! What's your favourite EWF anthem?

angles.name: EWF Celebration
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire on July 25th! The legendary bassist still brings the funk.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Thurston Moore
moments.blurb: Sonic Youth co-founder and guitarist Thurston Moore celebrates his 68th birthday on Friday, July 25th.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to indie rock pioneer Thurston Moore from Sonic Youth on Friday! What's your favourite track from the alt-rock legends?

angles.name: Sonic Youth Shoutout
angles.copy: Celebrating Thurston Moore of Sonic Youth, who turns 68 on July 25th! Still pushing boundaries in music.
